name: Tenet Healthcare Corporation
description: Tenet Healthcare Corporation is a prominent American for-profit multinational healthcare services company headquartered in Dallas, Texas. The organization operates a diverse network of healthcare facilities, including approximately 65 hospitals and over 450 outpatient centers and surgical facilities. Through its various brands, subsidiaries, and joint ventures—most notably United Surgical Partners International (USPI)—Tenet provides a wide range of medical services. The company is dedicated to delivering high-quality, compassionate care while focusing on operational excellence and strategic growth to meet the evolving needs of patients and communities across the United States.
